briefdescription.para: DPPI channel groups.
DPPI tasks.
Function for getting the total number of available channels for the given DPPIC instance.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the total number of available groups for the given DPPIC instance.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for activating a DPPI task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task to be activated.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of the specified DPPI task register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Requested task.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified task register.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking the state of a specific DPPI channel.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Channel to be checked.
The channel is enabled.
The channel is not enabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling multiple DPPI channels.

detaileddescription.para: The bits in mask value correspond to particular channels. It means that writing 1 to bit 0 enables channel 0, writing 1 to bit 1 enables channel 1 etc.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Channel mask.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling multiple DPPI channels.

detaileddescription.para: The bits in mask value correspond to particular channels. It means that writing 1 to bit 0 disables channel 0, writing 1 to bit 1 disables channel 1 etc.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Channel mask.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling all DPPI channels.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the subscribe configuration for a given DPPI task.

simplesect.para: After setting the subscription for a given task, channel group configuration associated with this task cannot be modified until nrf_dppi_subscribe_clear is used.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to subscribe events.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the subscribe configuration for a given DPPI task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the subscribe configuration for a given DPPI task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to read the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting multiple DPPI channels in a channel group.

detaileddescription.para: This function assigns all specified channels to the group. The bits in channel_mask value correspond to particular channels. It means that writing 1 to bit 0 includes channel 0, writing 1 to bit 1 includes channel 1, and so on.

simplesect.para: All channels included previously will be overwritten.
Channel group configuration can be modified only if subscriptions for tasks associated with this group are disabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Channels to be assigned in the group.
Channel group.

briefdescription.para: Function for including multiple DPPI channels in a channel group.

detaileddescription.para: This function adds all specified channels to the group. The bits in channel_mask value correspond to particular channels. It means that writing 1 to bit 0 includes channel 0, writing 1 to bit 1 includes channel 1 etc.

simplesect.para: Channel group configuration can be modified only if subscriptions for tasks associated with this group are disabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Channels to be included in the group.
Channel group.

briefdescription.para: Function for removing multiple DPPI channels from a channel group.

detaileddescription.para: This function removes all specified channels from the group. The bits in channel_mask value correspond to particular channels. It means that writing 1 to bit 0 removes channel 0, writing 1 to bit 1 removes channel 1 etc.

simplesect.para: Channel group configuration can be modified only if subscriptions for tasks associated with this group are disabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Channels to be removed from the group.
Channel group.

briefdescription.para: Function for removing all DPPI channels from a channel group.

simplesect.para: Channel group configuration can be modified only if subscriptions for tasks associated with this group are disabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Channel group.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling a channel group.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Channel group.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling a channel group.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Channel group.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the ENABLE task associated with the specified channel group.

parameterdescription.para: Channel group index.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the DISABLE task associated with the specified channel group.

parameterdescription.para: Channel group index.

briefdescription.para: Macro for setting publish/subscribe register corresponding to specified event/task.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the event or task for which publish/subscribe register is to be set.
DPPIC channel number.

briefdescription.para: Macro for clearing publish/subscribe register corresponding to specified event/task.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the event or task for which publish/subscribe register is to be cleared.

briefdescription.para: Macro for enabling publish/subscribe register corresponding to specified event/task.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the event or task for which publish/subscribe register is to be used.

briefdescription.para: Macro for disabling publish/subscribe register corresponding to specified event/task.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the event or task for which publish/subscribe register is to be used.

briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating whether DPPI instance can be mapped to a peripheral based on common APB.
Symbol specifying bitmask for mapping specific DPPIC to a respective APB it belongs to.
Hardware access layer for managing the Distributed Programmable Peripheral Interconnect Controller (DPPIC).
